mapper.update: UPDATE de_energy_flow_diagram SET diagram_data = #{diagramData}, name = #{name}, canvas_width = #{canvasWidth}, canvas_height = #{canvasHeight}, background_color = #{backgroundColor}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE de_energy_flow_diagram SET deleted = 1, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
